\tzpentry{ID3374}{Theta Conjugate SphericalHarmonicY Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3374 introduces Theta Conjugate SphericalHarmonicY Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[Theta], \[Phi]] Conjugate[SphericalHarmonicY[l, m, \[Theta]', \[Phi]']] (Min[r, rp]/Max[r, rp])^l / Max[r, rp], {l, 0, Infinity}, {m, -l, l}]; G0 + Gsc ]; \end{implementation} \subsection{Vector Potential Decomposition} \begin{definition}[Total Vector Potential] The vector potential at a point \((r,$\theta$,\varphi)\) and time \(t\) is decomposed as \[ A(r,$\theta$,\varphi,t) = A_{\text{classical}} + A_{\text{quantum}} + A_{\text{photon}} + A_{\text{boundary}}, \]
